name: PipelineTerraformProviderMirror
description: Configure Terraform to download providers from a network mirror instead of the public registry
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: mirrorUrl
inputs.label: Mirror URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of the network mirror for provider downloads. Must use HTTPS. Example: https://registry.example.com/terraform/providers

inputs.name: allowDirectFallback
inputs.label: Allow direct registry fallback
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, Terraform can fall back to downloading providers directly from registry.terraform.io if the mirror does not have them. When disabled, the mirror is authoritative for all providers.

inputs.name: directExcludePatterns
inputs.label: Exclude from direct (force mirror)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Provider namespace patterns to exclude from direct download (one per line). These providers will only be fetched from the mirror. Example: registry.terraform.io/company-internal/*

inputs.name: directIncludePatterns
inputs.label: Include for direct (bypass mirror)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Provider namespace patterns to include for direct download (one per line). When specified, only these providers can use direct download; all others must use the mirror. Example: registry.terraform.io/hashicorp/*

outputVariables.name: configFilePath
outputVariables.description: The path to the generated .terraformrc configuration file.

messages.GeneratingConfig: Generating Terraform CLI configuration for provider mirror: %s
messages.InsecureUrlRejected: Insecure URL rejected: %s. Only HTTPS URLs are allowed.
